chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-719 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 29-04-2025 Mr. Qadeer Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G along with Muhammad Hassan Shaikh, Assistant litigation on behalf of Survey Superintendent, Khairpur (respondent No.5) -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Compliance reports filed by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Pano Aqil (respondent No.3), Assistant Commissioner, Pano Akil (respondent No.4) and Survey Superintendent Sukkur Division @ Khairpur (respondent No.5), have been taken on record. Muhammad Hassan Shaikh, appearing on behalf of Survey Superintendent, Khairpur submits that joint demarcation was carried out on 24-4-2025, in presence of the concerned parties. After such statement, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petitioner. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
